pr.title: Record: 9L MLP3x Full Stack + Custom Kernel Pipeline, val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: 9-layer GQA transformer uses SmearGate+BigramHash embeddings, Muon+NTK-RoPE scaling, and custom Triton fusion kernels to squeeze more steps in 10 minutes.
techniques: - SmearGate with BigramHash token blending and int6+zstd compression
- Muon optimizer with orthogonal init, muP scaling, NTK-RoPE, and SWA
- Custom Triton/CUDA kernels fusing RMSNorm+QKV, ReLU² MLP, and softcap+CE
